summary: Completed Phase 1 frontend testing for KINETIC Connected Body hero. Manual node interactions, navigation, and mobile responsiveness work correctly. Two critical bugs found: auto propagation not firing and prefers-reduced-motion static state not applied.

critical_bugs.issue: Auto propagation does not fire - expected to start at 2.2s after page load and repeat every 9s, but no automatic animation occurs
critical_bugs.impact: Users never see the kinetic chain animation unless they manually click a node
critical_bugs.tested_scenarios: Waited 3s, 5.5s, and 14.5s after page load - no auto propagation detected

critical_bugs.issue: Prefers-reduced-motion static state not applied - when prefers-reduced-motion: reduce is set, the static left chain (ankle-l to occiput) should be visible immediately with bronze nodes and annotations, but all nodes remain dormant
critical_bugs.impact: Users with motion sensitivity preferences do not see the accessible static version
critical_bugs.tested_scenarios: Emulated prefers-reduced-motion: reduce - no bronze nodes or annotations visible

design_issues.issue: Missing Description for DialogContent - shadcn Sheet component accessibility warning

passed_tests: Home page loads without console errors
Hero section renders with SVG body map, H1 'Pain is a signal. Rarely the source.', CTA buttons, and legend
Manual node click interactions work correctly - bronze color rgb(124, 95, 70) applied via inline style.fill
Kinetic chain propagation animates correctly on manual clicks
Annotations 'ORIGIN OF DYSFUNCTION' and 'PAIN FELT HERE' type on correctly during propagation
Mid-animation node switch works - old chain resets, new chain plays without state corruption
Keyboard accessibility - Tab navigation works, node buttons are focusable
Header navigation - all desktop nav links (Approach, Conditions, About, Book) navigate correctly
Wordmark returns to home page
Route navigation - /approach, /conditions, /about, /booking all render placeholder pages correctly
404 page renders with 'This page lost its alignment.' message
Placeholder pages have working 'Return to the living system' links
Mobile (390x844) - exactly 5 node hotspots visible (ankle-l, knee-r, hip-l, l4, c7)
Mobile - 7 desktop-only nodes correctly hidden
Mobile - 'Tap a point' hint chip visible
Mobile - tapping nodes triggers propagation correctly
Mobile - desktop nav hidden, mobile menu button visible
Mobile - menu sheet opens with 3 nav links + Book CTA
Mobile - navigation from sheet works and closes sheet
Pointer movement - lens effect (contrast circle) follows cursor correctly
No JavaScript errors during load, node clicks, pointer movement, or route navigation

success_percentage.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per instructions

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix two CRITICAL bugs in ConnectedBodyHero.jsx: (1) Auto propagation not firing - investigate why GSAP delayedCall at line 283 isn't executing (check document.hidden, IntersectionObserver, or useGSAP lifecycle issues). (2) Prefers-reduced-motion static state not being applied - the reduced motion check at line 61 may not be working correctly. Also fix minor accessibility warning for mobile Sheet component (add Description or aria-describedby).
